excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Generative AI and the Humanities lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/72026-atf-atp-lcf-lcp Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: Please note that all fields on the application forms should be filled. Applications that do not include details of an applicant’s academic qualifications will not be considered.
